en: So now it's up to you to make the peace between me and Sonny.
ko: 이제 당신이 나와 소니 사이의 평화를 만들어야 해.

en: Sonny was hot for my deal, wasn't he?
ko: 소니는 내 거래에 관심이 많았지, 그치?

en: And you knew it was the right thing to do.
ko: 그리고 당신은 그게 옳은 일이라는 걸 알았어.

en: Sonny will come after you with everything he's got. That'll be his first reaction, sure.
ko: 소니는 모든 걸 걸고 당신을 쫓아올 거야.

en: That's why you got to talk some sense to him.
ko: 그래서 그에게 이성을 좀 이야기해야 해.

en: But the Tattaglia family is behind me with all their people.
ko: 타탈리아 가족이 나를 지지하고 있어, 그들의 모든 사람과 함께.

en: The other New York families will go along with anything that'll prevent a full-scale war.
ko: 다른 뉴욕 가족들도 전면전만 막을 수 있다면 뭐든지 따라갈 거야.

en: Let's face it, Tom, I'm all due respect.
The Don, rest in peace, was slipping.
Ten years ago, could I have gotten to him?
Well, now he's dead. He's dead, Tom, and nothing can bring him back.
